attributes.description: Show active outbound network connections from known AI processes on macOS and Linux. Use for shadow AI C2 and data exfiltration triage — identifies Ollama, Claude, Cursor, Copilot, MCP servers, and other AI tools making external connections, with RFC1918 classification.
attributes.query:
SELECT p.name AS process_name, p.path AS process_path, p.cmdline, p.pid, u.username, pos.remote_address, pos.remote_port, pos.local_port, pos.local_address, pos.state, CASE pos.family WHEN 2 THEN 'IPv4' WHEN 10 THEN 'IPv6' ELSE 'unknown' END AS address_family, CASE pos.protocol WHEN 6 THEN 'tcp' WHEN 17 THEN 'udp' ELSE CAST(pos.protocol AS TEXT) END AS transport_protocol, CASE WHEN pos.remote_address LIKE '10.%' OR pos.remote_address LIKE '192.168.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_rfc1918_destination, datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time FROM process_open_sockets pos JOIN processes p ON pos.pid = p.pid LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid WHERE pos.remote_address NOT IN ('127.0.0.1', '::1', '0.0.0.0', '::') AND pos.remote_address != '' AND (pos.state IN ('ESTABLISHED', 'CLOSE_WAIT', 'SYN_SENT') OR pos.state IS NULL) AND ( p.name IN ( 'ollama', 'claude', 'cursor', 'Cursor', 'windsurf', 'Windsurf', 'ChatGPT', 'copilot-agent', 'aider', 'codex', 'lms', 'gpt4all', 'jan', 'llama-server', 'open-webui', 'litellm', 'koboldcpp', 'vllm', 'llamafile', 'tabby', 'exo', 'qwen', 'grok', 'gemini-cli', 'genaiscript', 'openai', 'llm', 'bolt', 'replit', 'ghostwriter', 'bito') OR p.cmdline LIKE '%ollama serve%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude-code%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%cursor-retrieval%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%github.copilot%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama-server%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%vllm.entrypoints%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-server%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@modelcontextprotocol%' 
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openclaw%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%moltbot%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%clawdbot%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%gemini-cli%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%genaiscript%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%autogpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%crewai%'
    )
